name: ExtensionElementDefinition_Constraint_Suppress
title: R5: Suppress warning or hint in profile (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` 0..1 `boolean`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` has a context of ElementDefinition.constraint based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ElementDefinition`.
Element `ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Suppress warning or hint in profile (new)
element.comment:
Element `ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` has a context of ElementDefinition.constraint based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ElementDefinition`.
Element `ElementDefinition.constraint.suppress` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element should only be present in a derived profile where a warning or hint has been determined to be spurious/incorrect. E.g. a warning encouraging the inclusion of an element that the profile explicitly prohibits.

element.short: Suppress warning or hint in profile
element.definition: If true, indicates that the warning or best practice guideline should be suppressed.
element.comment: This element should only be present in a derived profile where a warning or hint has been determined to be spurious/incorrect. E.g. a warning encouraging the inclusion of an element that the profile explicitly prohibits.
